title: PMS Garden Hose FloHose - Length 30m/100ft Expandable Hose with Multiple Spray Settings. Garden Hose Spray Gun. High Pressure Hose Attachment. Garden Tools. Car Washing Kit
features: INNOVATIVE DESIGN: The green expanding hose with 7 dial spray gun is ingeniously designed to extend up to 30 meters, ensuring maximum reach and flexibility for every corner of your garden.
UNMATCHED QUALITY: Crafted from durable materials, this expanding hose is built to withstand daily wear and tear, providing long-lasting performance you can rely on for all your gardening needs.
7-DIAL SPRAY GUN: Easily adjust to your preferred spray pattern with the versatile 7-dial spray gun attachment, satisfying the hydration needs of diverse plants and lawn features.

PERFECT FOR ALL GARDENING ENTHUSIASTS: This multipurpose gardening solution is ideal for seasoned professionals and beginners alike, simplifying garden maintenance tasks and providing the convenience you'll love.
EFFORTLESS PORTABILITY: The lightweight design, combined with its expandable and retractable nature, makes the green expanding hose a breeze to transport and store, even in limited spaces.
description: Our Expanding Hose With 7 Dial Spray Gun works well for cleaning, watering, and other household needs.
